payload.description: Topic titles in the FeedbackAnalysis report are currently keyword lists (e.g., 'keyword1, keyword2, keyword3'). They need to be LLM-generated human-readable names like the original semantic reinforcement memory design intended. In _run_memory_analysis in plexus/reports/blocks/feedback_analysis.py, after clustering, call the LLM (using the existing LangChain/Bedrock patterns in the codebase) to generate a descriptive topic label for each cluster based on its top keywords and exemplar texts. The generated label should replace the raw keyword list as the topic's label field.
payload.title: LLM-generated topic labels in memory analysis
